title: Sikh Musical Heritage: The Untold Story
original_title: Sikh Musical Heritage: The Untold Story
overview: Sikh Musical Heritage: The Untold Story is an in-depth look at the history of traditional Sikh instrumentation and its crucial role in performing the devotional singing known as Kirtan of the Sikh Scripture, Guru Granth Sahib.
